title: inula × pleiocephala
intro: Inula × pleiocephala, also known as the hybrid elecampane, is a rare, sterile hybrid plant derived from the cross between Inula helenioides and Inula salicina. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain sesquiterpenes that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Inula × pleiocephala include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Inula × pleiocephala may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional or experienced herbalist before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
